_comment: Scenario 16: VIO Failure — LOITER on degradation, fault flag clearance on recovery

scenario.name: vio_failure
scenario.description: Inject VIO quality degradation mid-flight via fault override. Verifies FaultManager's VIO fault detection: quality=1 triggers LOITER via FAULT_VIO_DEGRADED. After VIO override is cleared, the fault flag clears but action stays at LOITER (escalation-only policy).

steps._comment: Degrade VIO to quality=1 (DEGRADED) — expect LOITER
Restore VIO — fault flag clears but action stays LOITER (escalation-only)
